hero.title: Stop waiting weeks for Google to index your URLs
hero.description: Instant Indexer pings Google the moment you submit. Watch every page, backlink, and money site move from submitted → crawled → indexed in minutes — not weeks.

problem.label: THE PROBLEM
problem.title: Unindexed URLs are invisible URLs
problem.description: Every day Google hasn't crawled your page is a day it can't rank, can't convert, and can't earn back what you paid to make it.

cards.title: Weeks of dead air
cards.text: New pages can sit unindexed for 2–8 weeks. Every day invisible is a day of lost traffic.

cards.title: Rankings you never earn
cards.text: If Google hasn't crawled it, it can't rank it. Your best content stays buried on nobody's page one.

cards.title: Content budget up in smoke
cards.text: You paid writers and link builders. Unindexed URLs make every dollar of that spend worthless.

cards.title: Manual submission won't scale
cards.text: Pasting URLs into Search Console one by one breaks the second you have 500 backlinks to push.

howItWorks.label: HOW IT WORKS
howItWorks.title: Submitted. Crawled. Indexed. Tracked.
howItWorks.description: Four stages. One dashboard. Every URL accounted for from paste to page one.

steps.title: You submit
steps.text: Drop in a list of pages or backlinks — up to 1,500 at once.

steps.title: We get it crawled
steps.text: Priority signals push Googlebot to your URLs immediately.

steps.title: Google indexes
steps.text: Pages enter the index in minutes, not weeks of waiting.

steps.title: You track it
steps.text: Every status flips to indexed live on your dashboard.

liveDemo.title: Your whole indexing pipeline, in one dashboard
liveDemo.description: Create campaigns, import sitemaps, and watch every URL flip to Google-verified indexed — without leaving the panel.

header.title: Campaign
header.subtitle: Manual index checks and live status

pricing.label: PRICING
pricing.title: Pay per link. No subscription. No expiry.
pricing.description: Buy links once and use them whenever. Need it now? Jump the queue with VIP Instant Index.

items.question: How fast will my URLs actually get indexed?
items.answer: VIP Instant Index gets roughly 95% of links indexed in 5–20 minutes. Normal indexing typically completes within 24–48 hours. Timing depends on the destination — a fresh money site behaves differently from an aged backlink.

items.question: How do you verify a URL is actually indexed?
items.answer: We run real Google search checks against each submitted URL and update the status live on your dashboard — not self-reported guesses.

items.question: Is this safe and within Google's guidelines?
items.answer: Yes. We send crawl priority signals through legitimate channels. There is no cloaking, no spam, and no gray-hat tricks — just faster discovery of URLs you already own or have earned.

items.question: What kind of URLs can I submit?
items.answer: Pages, blog posts, product URLs, backlinks, landing pages, and sitemap imports — up to 1,500 URLs per batch.

items.question: Do my credits expire?
items.answer: No. Credits never expire. Buy once, use whenever you need indexing — no subscriptions and no lock-in.

finalCta.title: Get indexed before your competitors finish their coffee
finalCta.description: Start with 100 free trial links. Scale to VIP instant indexing the moment you need speed.
